title: Copper Tools & Armor Backport
description: Backport the copper tools & Armor to older versions of minecraft.
body:
**Copper Tools & Armor Backport**
✔ Backports the official Copper Gear from modern Minecraft to older versions!
Copper becomes useful again!
This mod brings the full Copper Tools & Armor set from the newest Minecraft versions and backports them to older releases — giving copper an actual purpose in early-game progression.⚔️ 

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![backport](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbe14e3d04a8ac4f7e8ea910d9523c4b906cc77c.webp)

![backport](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/068583ba29748421910187ef1735f6fb9a59ec75.png)

**🛠 What This Mod Adds**
This backport introduces the complete Copper gear lineup:

🧱 Copper Tools

Copper Pickaxe
Copper Axe & Copper Shovel
Copper Hoe & Copper Sword
Copper Helmet & Copper Chestplate
Copper Leggings & Copper Boots

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cd0ad096ad5afd2c947bd872071c0554592091c.jpeg)


![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f5b4e69f959c6aea82530470166d31152ccc1d7.png)

https://discord.gg/yCvcfjEe

**Join the discord for support and update alerts!**


![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
